required_changes: [gem route balance] Rebuild the connection between gem regions [1,2]->[1,3] and [1,5]->[3,6]: add a stronger route gate or separate the regions so the easiest connection no longer dominates other gem-region choices.

[gem route balance] Rebuild the connection between gem regions [4,4]->[4,4] and [1,5]->[3,6]: add a stronger route gate or separate the regions so the easiest connection no longer dominates other gem-region choices.

[gem route balance] Rebuild the connection between gem regions [4,4]->[4,4] and [8,4]->[8,6]: add a stronger route gate or separate the regions so the easiest connection no longer dominates other gem-region choices.

[gem route balance] Rebuild the connection between gem regions [5,8]->[5,8] and [7,8]->[7,8]: add a stronger route gate or separate the regions so the easiest connection no longer dominates other gem-region choices.
summary: current: MT3 passes: valid 13x13 map, exact MT3 resource progression, remaining whole-tower tool budget respected, enemy policy and adjacency checks pass, and the map offers viable central/left/right pressured route choices with protected rewards. | connectivity density: Connectivity and density pass: wall_ratio 0.627 and monster_density_non_wall 0.317 create compact high-pressure routing, main_cycle_rank_ratio 0.111 avoids open-grid sprawl, and the exit route has sufficient enemy and door pressure while side branches remain controlled. | resource balance: Resource balance passes: the entrance/free region exposes no resources or tools, low-cost starter rewards are small and staged behind combat, blue doors unlock stronger route or finish access, and the centerFly is protected behind central blue-door combat pressure. | monster damage: Monster pacing is acceptable: the mandatory route uses varied pressure at [6,11], [6,9], [6,7], [6,5], and [6,3], while side-branch enemies protect real rewards. No zone or repulse monsters are placed, so there is no decorative special-damage issue in scope. | gem route balance: Gem route balance reviewer found 4 route/resource imbalance issue(s).
